name: Spanish Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, celery, pepper, and garlic in water over medium heat until fragrant (omit oil as per original recipe).
2. Add chili powder and cumin to the skillet. Stir and cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add chopped tomatoes, salt, oregano, and black pepper. Cook until the tomatoes are softened and cooked through.
4. Stir in the cooked brown rice and mix well until heated through. Serve warm.
